title: Rogue
description: A datapack designed to turn the game into a sandbox-oriented rougelite.
body:
**IMPORTANT: I am currently working on other projects and may return to this one in the future. Sorry for immediately putting this one on the side.**

**Note: This datapack is still in its pre-alpha stages and could change at any point. These changes may possibly break your world after switching to a new datapack version. This should be said in the versions changelog.**

**This datapack is also currently singleplayer only and could potentially be ported to multiplayer (no promises there)**

# Purpose

Rogue is a datapack attempting to replicate the rougelite-sandbox elements of [Himno - The Silent Melody](https://store.steampowered.com/app/1079230/Himno__The_Silent_Melody/) with less punishing mechanics and a more sandbox oriented design. Players will start on a skyblock-like island in the void, with a strange structure with a button. Upon pressing this button, the player will be teleported to a random point in the overworld. From there, the player must gather resources and either die, or find a recall potion and travel back to their base. After going on a run, the player can upgrade their island with farms, builds, and more.

# Death Changes

To fit with the new roguelite theme, upon dying players no longer lose their gear. In the future there will be a configuration for this and for if you want to lose some of your items still when you die (percentage of items lost).

# Notes

* You can find the crafting recipes in the gallery for now. (or just unlock them) (later there will be a wiki either on the github or a github pages website)

* You unlock the recall potion recipe just by playing the game.

# Plans

## Todo

* Add upgrades to base player stats (health, damage, armor, ect)

* Add set bonuses to each armor set

* Add bonuses for each armor trim material

* Make each run get more difficult until the player has to go home and then reset it

* Make into more of a rougelite

* Before exiting pre-alpha increase the general diffuculty of the game

* Configuration for the datapack

* General pollishing (obviously)

* Make death more punsishing

* Possibly a skill tree (likely not)

* Transportation for mobs (send villagers, animals, ect to your base.)
